# NLU Cloud
> Independent essays on AI, language, cognition, society, education, humanities, and everyday life.

Canonical site: https://nlucloud.com/
Sitemap: https://nlucloud.com/sitemap-index.xml

## About
NLU Cloud is an independent editorial magazine translating SSRN research into public essays on human–AI interaction. Research papers are authoritative sources; essays are editorial derivatives — often several per paper.

## Author
Liang Zhang · Independent Researcher
ORCID: https://orcid.org/0009-0002-0124-1706
SSRN: https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/cf_dev/AbsByAuth.cfm?per_id=7868315

## Primary sections
- https://nlucloud.com/essays/ — Published editorial essays (six columns)
- https://nlucloud.com/research/ — SSRN working paper index (6 papers)
- https://nlucloud.com/frameworks/ — Named research frameworks (JAP, LMO, Waiting Tax, etc.)
- https://nlucloud.com/editors-notes/ — Editor's commentary

## Published essays (editorial highlights)
- https://nlucloud.com/essays/ai-as-orchestration-layer/ — AI as orchestration layer in education (Learning Model Orchestration)
- https://nlucloud.com/essays/ai-generates-options-humans-complete-value/ — Judgment-as-Product: humans complete value
- https://nlucloud.com/essays/waiting-is-not-free-time/ — AI Waiting Tax: waiting is not free time

## Research frameworks on this site
- Judgment-as-Product (JAP) — judgment completes value under generative abundance
- Learning Model Orchestration (LMO) — orchestrating learning models beyond personalization
- AI Waiting Tax / AI Latency Tax — cognitive and structural costs of AI-mediated delay
- Expression Distortion Cost (EDC) / Self-Alignment Load (SAL) — user-side misalignment before the model responds
- Motivational reweighting — AI reweights creative motives rather than replacing them

## Citation
For academic use, cite the original SSRN paper. For this site, cite the essay URL and publication date.
Full machine-readable index: https://nlucloud.com/llms-full.txt
